system.description: Limptwitch was a Whisper who interrogated ghosts to find the location of hidden treasure. He was famous for his Grotto, the place where he stored all his salvaged wealth. Many factions tried to get his treasure, but he never gave up the secret. Then he was jailed and hanged. The Grotto was never found.
system.additional_info: Did a cellmate in prison hear muttered hints as to its location? Maybe a Whisper has clues based on where he left his mark in the sewers. Has someone finally found a real lead?
